productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Training Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionBlue t-shirt made of 100% polyester, with a 100% polyester mesh lining on the sides, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, ribbed V-neck, fabric tape at inseam of the collar, short sleeves, black shoulder panels and embroidered logo on the right chest, with an embroidered Dri-Fit badge on the left above the hemlineFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not use softeners Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Tumble dry low Do not iron or dry clean Up your ante and make those winning soccer goals in style with this nike t-shirt. Made of polyester and engineered with Dry-Fit technology, you are assured of fresh and dry cofmort while you sweat it out in a heated game. Team this with nike performance shorts and football cleats for that perfect sporting outfit, or with casual sports footwear for unparalleled cool.
